# notificationInfo

**Instance Property**

A dictionary containing information about how the system should alert the user.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute CloudKit.NotificationInfo notificationInfo;
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/cloudkit-js-data-types].
